items.project_definition: The set of programmatic endpoints hosted under /api/v1/ providing the interface for platform operations.
A learning offering owned by an instructor, containing a title, description, pricing in cents, visibility status, and sequential content.
The required security mechanism for transforming sensitive password credentials into non-reversible strings for storage.
A relational link between a student and a specific learning offering that tracks a percentage from 0 to 100 and a finalization date.
The requirement to store monetary values using integers representing the smallest currency unit to avoid floating-point precision errors.
The standardized lightweight data-interchange format used for all response envelopes containing data, meta, and error arrays.
A child component of a learning offering representing a lesson or section within a strictly defined sequence.
The architectural style governing the network interface and the design of the system endpoints.
A shared account identity containing a role, email, credentials, and display name to distinguish between students and instructors.
